sections.paragraph:
παῖς, παιδός, ὁ/ἡ [Skt. assoc.] basic idea: one in a dependent capacity, child

—1. male infant Mt 2:16.

—2. of post-infancy offspring

—a. in general, pl. children Mt 21:15.

—b. of a specific child, ὁ παῖς boy Mt 8:6; 17:18; Lk 2:43; 9:42; J 4:51; Ac 20:12; ἡ παῖς girl Lk 8:51, 54.

—3. a strong component of obedience connected with the concept of child appears to be present in the extension of π.

—a. to one in servile capacity, slave Lk 7:7; 12:45; 15:26.

—b. to one engaged in special service to a superior

—α. a royal attendant courtier Mt 14:2.

—β. God’s attendant servant: Israel collectively Lk 1:54; David vs. 69; Ac 4:25; Christ as unique servant Mt 12:18; Ac 3:13, 26; 4:27, 30.
